title: tephrosia hockii subsp. hockii
intro: Tephrosia hockii subsp. hockii, a perennial leguminous plant, is a species of Tephrosia native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia hockii subsp. hockii include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
